description: Adversarial premise-poisoning fixture for tests/integration/logic/hammers/test_adversarial_hammer.py (HAMMER-014). `poisoned_theorem_id` re-declares an identity that already exists in tests/fixtures/logic/hammers/golden_corpus.json (`Hammer.Nat.add_comm`) but with a semantically different, maliciously altered statement. Ingesting this entry against the golden corpus manifest must raise DuplicateTheoremIdentityError -- a poisoning attempt must never be allowed to silently redefine an existing, trusted premise identity.
poisoned_statement: theorem add_comm : forall a b : Nat, Nat.add a b = Nat.zero
